{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Vastwood Mammoth
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Vastwood Mammoth]] is a large sacred beast that lies across the landscape.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c15">''Ghostwater'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Sacred beasts]]
